javascript:(()%3D%3E%7B(()%3D%3E%7Bvar%20p%3D%7Blisteners%3A%7B%7D%2CactiveKeys%3Anew%20Set%2Con%3Afunction(r%2Ce)%7Bthis.listeners%5Br%5D%7C%7C(this.listeners%5Br%5D%3D%5B%5D)%2Cthis.listeners%5Br%5D.push(e)%7D%2Cremove%3Afunction(r%2Ce)%7Bthis.listeners%5Br%5D%26%26(this.listeners%5Br%5D%3Dthis.listeners%5Br%5D.filter(t%3D%3Et!%3D%3De))%7D%2Cemit%3Afunction(r%2Ce)%7Bthis.listeners%5Br%5D%26%26this.listeners%5Br%5D.forEach(t%3D%3Et(e))%7D%2CtrackKey%3Afunction(r%2Ce%2Ct)%7Br%3D%3D%3D%22keydown%22%26%26moduleManager.handleKeyPress(t)%2Cr%3D%3D%3D%22keydown%22%26%26!this.activeKeys.has(e)%26%26(this.activeKeys.add(e)%2Cthis.emit(%22keyPress%22%2C%7Bkey%3Ae%2Ccode%3At%7D))%2Cr%3D%3D%3D%22keyup%22%26%26this.activeKeys.has(e)%26%26(this.activeKeys.delete(e)%2Cthis.emit(%22keyRelease%22%2C%7Bkey%3Ae%2Ccode%3At%7D))%7D%7D%3Bvar%20n%3D%7BgameScript%3A%22%22%2Cget%20game()%7Breturn%20this._game%3Fthis._game%3Athis._game%3DObject.values(document.querySelector(%22%23react%22))%5B0%5D.updateQueue.baseState.element.props.game%7D%2Casync%20getGameScript()%7Blet%20r%3DObject.values(document.scripts).find(e%3D%3Ee.src.includes(%22index-%22))%3Bif(r.src)%7Blet%20e%3Dawait%20fetch(r.src)%3Bthis.gameScript%3Dawait%20e.text()%7D%7D%2ChookOnTick()%7Blet%20r%3Dthis%3Bthis._fixedUpdate%3Dthis.game.fixedUpdate%2Cthis.game.fixedUpdate%3Dfunction()%7Bp.emit(%22beforeTick%22)%3Blet%20e%3Dr._fixedUpdate.apply(this%2Carguments)%3Breturn%20p.emit(%22afterTick%22)%2Ce%7D%7D%7D%3Bvar%20f%3D%7BfromBlockStateId(r)%7Blet%20e%3Dn.game.world.chunkProvider.posToChunk.values().next().value.constructor%2Ct%3Dnull%3Breturn%20e.prototype.setBlockState.bind(%7BgetBlockState%3Afunction()%7Breturn%7Bequals%3Afunction(o)%7Breturn%20t%3Do%2C!0%7D%7D%7D%7D)(0%2Cr)%2Ct%7D%2Cget%20BlockPos()%7Bif(this._cBlockPos)return%20this._cBlockPos%3Blet%20r%3D%7B%7D%3Breturn%20n.game.world.setAirXYZ.bind(%7BsetBlockState%3Afunction(e)%7Br%3De%7D%7D)(0%2C0%2C0)%2Cthis._cBlockPos%3Dr.constructor%2Cthis._cBlockPos%7D%7D%3Bvar%2 )%2Cn.game.player.onGround%3D!1)%7D%7D%3Bvar%20T%3Dclass%20extends%20a%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22PacketLogger%22%2C%22Misc%22%2C%7B%7D)%7DtrimName(e)%7Breturn%20e.substring(0%2C15)%7DonPacket(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.trimName(e.name)%3Bthis.options%5Bt%5D%7C%7C(this.options%5Bt%5D%3D%22true%22%2Cy.modules.ClickGUI.panels.find(o%3D%3Eo.title%3D%3Dthis.category).refreshModuleSettings())%2Cthis.options%5Bt%5D%3D%3D%22true%22%26%26console.log(e.name%2Ce.data)%7D%7D%3Bvar%20M%3Dclass%20extends%20a%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22SelfHarm%22%2C%22Misc%22)%7DonEnable()%7Bn.game.controller.objectMouseOver.hitVec%3Dn.game.player.pos.clone()%2Cn.game.controller.attackEntity(n.game.player)%2Cthis.disable()%7D%7D%3Bvar%20I%3Dclass%20extends%20a%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22ViewCmdBlockCode%22%2C%22Misc%22)%7Dget%20CommandBlockLogic()%7Breturn%20Blocks.command_block.createNewTileEntity().commandBlockLogic.constructor.prototype%7DonEnable()%7Bthis._tryOpenEditCommandBlock%3Dthis._tryOpenEditCommandBlock%7C%7Cthis.CommandBlockLogic.tryOpenEditCommandBlock%2Cthis.CommandBlockLogic.tryOpenEditCommandBlock%3Dfunction(e)%7Be.openEditCommandBlock(this)%7D%7DonDisable()%7Bthis.CommandBlockLogic.tryOpenEditCommandBlock%3Dthis._tryOpenEditCommandBlock%7D%7D%3Bvar%20O%3Dclass%20extends%20a%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22Airjump%22%2C%22Movement%22%2Cnull)%7DbeforeTick()%7Bn.game.player.jumping%26%26(n.game.player.onGround%3D!0)%7D%7D%3Bvar%20_%3Dclass%20extends%20a%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22HighJump%22%2C%22Movement%22%2C%7B%22Jump%20Velocity%22%3A.6%7D)%7DonEnable()%7Bn.game.player.initialJumpVelocity%3DparseFloat(this.options%5B%22Jump%20Velocity%22%5D)%7DonDisable()%7Bn.game.player.initialJumpVelocity%3D.42%7D%7D%3Bvar%20Z%3D34%2Cre%3D1%2CL%3Dclass%20extends%20a%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22Jesus%22%2C%22Movement%22%2Cnull)%7DonEnable()%7Blet%20e%3Df.fromBlockStateId(Z).manager%2Ct%3Df.fromBlockStateId(re).manager.block.constructor%3Bthis.waterBlock%7C%7C(this.waterBlock%3De.block)%2Ce.block%3Dnew%20t% 1)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cr%0A%7D%5Cr%0A%5Cr%0A.with-animations%20.gui-button%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20animation%3A%20buttonReveal%20var(--button-appear-duration)%20var(--standard-easing)%20both%3B%5Cr%0A%7D%5Cr%0A%5Cr%0A%40keyframes%20buttonReveal%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%200%25%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20opacity%3A%200%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20transform%3A%20translateY(8px)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20100%25%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20opacity%3A%201%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20transform%3A%20translateY(0)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cr%0A%7D%5Cr%0A%5Cr%0A%40keyframes%20gui-panel-hide%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%200%25%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20opacity%3A%201%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20transform%3A%20perspective(1200px)%20scale(1)%20translateY(0)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20100%25%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20opacity%3A%200%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20transform%3A%20perspective(1200px)%20scale(0.97)%20translateY(8px)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cr%0A%7D%5Cr%0A%5Cr%0A%40keyframes%20gui-background-hide%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%200%25%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20opacity%3A%201%3B%20%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20backdrop-filter%3A%20blur(8px)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20background%3A%20rgba(0%2C%200%2C%200%2C%200.4)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20100%25%20%7B%20%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20opacity%3A%200%3B%20%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20backdrop-filter%3A%20blur(0px)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20background%3A%20rgba(0%2C%200%2C%200%2C%200)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cr%0A%7D%5Cr%0A%5Cr%0Ainput%2C%20textarea%2C%20%5Bcontenteditable%3D%22true%22%5D%2C%20.module-settings-wrapper%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20user-select%3A%20text%20!important%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20-webkit-user-select%3A%20text%20!important%3B%5Cr%0A%7D%5Cr%0A%5Cr%0A.gui-button-container%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20user-select%3A%20none%3B%5Cr%0A%7D%60%3Bvar%20b%3Dclass%7Bconstructor(e%2Ct%2Co)%7Bthis.name%3De%2Cthis.description%3Dt%2Cthis.arguments%3Darguments%7Dexecute(e)%7B%7D%7D%3Bvar%20%24%3Dclass%20extends%20b%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22give%22%2C%22Gives%20a%20player%20an%20item%22%2C%5B%22itemName%22%5D)%7Dexecute(e)%7Blet%20t%3De%5B0%5D%2Co%3Dnew%20Items.stone.constructor.__proto__(%22stone%22)%3Bo.name%3Dt%3Blet%20i%3DItems%3F.%5Bt%5D%7C%7CBlocks%5Bt%5D%3Bo.block%3Di%2Co.id%3Di.id%3Blet%20s%3Dn.game.controller.findHotbarSlotForPickBlock()%3Bn.game.player.inventory.main%5Bs%5D%3Dnew%20ItemStack(o)%2Cu.sendPacket(n.game.player.inventory.sendInventoryToServer())%7D%7D%3Bvar%20j%3Dclass%20extends%20b%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22help%22%2C%22Displays%20a%20list%20of%20available%20commands%22%2C%5B%5D)%7Dexecute(e)%7Bn.game.chat.addChat(%7Btext%3A%22Available%20commands%3A%22%7D)%2CObject.values(q.commands).forEach(t%3D%3E%7Bn.game.chat.addChat(%7Btext%3A%60.%24%7Bt.name%7D%20-%20%24%7Bt.description%7D%60%7D)%7D)%7D%7D%3Bvar%20J%3Dclass%20extends%20b%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22NBT%22%2C%22read%20or%20write%20NBT%20data%22%2C%5B%22cmd%22%2C%22data%22%5D)%7Dasync%20execute(e)%7Blet%20t%3De%5B0%5D%2Co%3Bif(e.length%3E1)try%7Bo%3DJSON.parse(e.slice(1).join(%22%20%22))%7Dcatch%7Bn.game.chat.addChat(%7Btext%3A%22Invalid%20JSON%20provided!%22%7D)%3Breturn%7Delse%20try%7Blet%20i%3Dawait%20navigator.clipboard.readText()%3Bo%3DJSON.parse(i)%7Dcatch%7Bn.game.chat.addChat(%7Btext%3A%22No%20valid%20JSON%20in%20clipboard!%22%7D)%3Breturn%7Dif(t%3D%3D%3D%22read%22)%7Blet%20i%3Dn.game.player.inventory.getCurrentItem()%3Bconsole.log(i)%7Delse%20if(t%3D%3D%3D%22write%22)%7Blet%20i%3Dn.game.player.inventory.getCurrentItem()%3Bfor(let%20s%20in%20o)i%5Bs%5D%3Do%5Bs%5D%3Bu.sendPacket(n.game.player.inventory.sendInventoryToServer())%2Cn.game.chat.addChat(%7Btext%3A%22Successfully%20wrote%20NBT%20data%20to%20item%22%7D)%7D%7D%7D%3Bvar%20q%3D%7Bcommands%3A%7B%7D%2Cprefix%3A%22.%22%2CregisterCommand(r)%7Blet%20e%3Dnew%20r%3Bthis.commands%5Be.name.toLowerCase()%5D%3De%7D%2CregisterCommands%3Afunction(...r)%7Bfor(let%20e%20of%20r)this.registerCommand(e)%7D%2ConPacket(r)%7Bif(r.name%3D%3D%22SPacketMessage%22)%7Blet%20e%3Dr.data.text%3Bif(e.startsWith(this.prefix))%7Blet%20t%3De.slice(this.prefix.length).split(%22%20%22)%2Co%3Dt.shift().toLowerCase()%2Ci%3Dthis.commands%5Bo%5D%3Bi%3Fi.execute(t)%3An.game.chat.addChat(%7Btext%3A%22Unknown%20command.%20Type%20.help%20for%20a%20list%20of%20commands.%22%7D)%2Cr.data.text%3D%22%22%7D%7D%7D%2Cinit()%7Bp.on(%22packet%22%2Cthis.onPacket.bind(this))%2Cthis.registerCommands(j%2C%24%2CJ)%7D%7D%3Bfunction%20ne(r)%7Blet%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22style%22)%3Be.textContent%3Dr%2Cd.wrapper.appendChild(e)%7Dvar%20se%3Dnew%20FontFace(%22Product%20Sans%22%2C%22url(https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.gstatic.com%2Fs%2Fproductsans%2Fv19%2FpxiDypQkot1TnFhsFMOfGShVF9eO.woff2)%22%2C%7Bstyle%3A%22normal%22%2Cweight%3A%22400%22%7D)%3Bse.load().then(r%3D%3Edocument.fonts.add(r))%3Bvar%20ae%3Dnew%20FontFace(%22Inter%22%2C%22url(https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.gstatic.com%2Fs%2Finter%2Fv18%2FUcCO3FwrK3iLTeHuS_fvQtMwCp50KnMa.woff2)%22%2C%7Bstyle%3A%22normal%22%2Cweight%3A%22300%22%7D)%3Bae.load().then(r%3D%3Edocument.fonts.add(r))%3Bne(te)%3Bfunction%20oe()%7By.init()%2Cn.getGameScript()%2Cn.hookOnTick()%2Cu.init()%2Cq.init()%2Cdocument.addEventListener(%22keydown%22%2Ce%3D%3E%7Bp.emit(%22keydown%22%2Ce.code)%7D)%2CsetInterval(()%3D%3E%7Bp.emit(%22render%22)%7D%2C1e3%2F60)%2C!0%26%26(window.ballcrack%3D%7Bhooks%3An%2CshadowWrapper%3Ad%2CmoduleManager%3Ay%2CinteractionUtils%3AX%2CblockUtils%3Af%2CpacketUtils%3Au%2CcommandManager%3Aq%2CreactUtils%3AE%2CmobxUtils%3Ax%7D)%7Ddocument.readyState%3D%3D%3D%22complete%22%7C%7Cdocument.readyState%3D%3D%3D%22interactive%22%3Foe()%3Adocument.addEventListener(%22DOMContentLoaded%22%2Coe)%3B%7D)()%3B%0A%7D)()
